calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio.
Edward Singer, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: Trophy Properties I DE, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Luis Mitter, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defaulted Defendant: Steve Morrow.
Dismissal filed with Clerk's Office today as to Co-Defendant: Michelle Siouris dba California Street Cafe.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Tenant Ledger-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1400 California St., Ground Floor Retail Unit, San Francisco, CA. 94109
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $47,836.59
Costs and Attorney's Fees to be determined by noticed Motion.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.
